text: I’ve been trying to connect to the app for days, but it keeps crashing every time I open it. This has never happened before, and it’s extremely frustrating. I’ve uninstalled and reinstalled but nothing works. Please help!

I recently changed my email address associated with my account, and since then, I have been unable to receive any verification codes sent to the new email. I have checked my spam folder multiple times and ensured that there are no filters in place that might block these emails. It's quite frustrating as I need to access my account urgently. Can you please assist me with this issue?
I received my order, but the box was crushed and the contents were damaged. I need a refund for this item. Here's a weird sticker on the box; not sure if it's relevant.
I recently updated my profile information, but I can no longer access my account. Please assist me in resolving this issue.
The product I received is not what I ordered. I would like a full refund, as the service was poor and the packaging was all torn. The delivery was also delayed, making the experience frustrating.
I can't believe this is happening again! I've called three times this week, and no one seems to care. I just want to talk to a manager about my issue.
hi, can you tell me if I can use my student id for discounts? also how do I apply that?
The app crashes when I try to upload photos. My phone is running the latest version. Also, I have a slow internet connection sometimes. Can you help?

I've been trying to upload my high-resolution images, but they keep failing. It's incredibly frustrating, especially since I need them for a project. I've double-checked the file sizes and formats, so I'm not sure where the problem lies. Can someone please help me?

I've been trying for days to reset my password, but every link I get seems broken. I'm so frustrated because I really need access to my account for important tasks. Is there someone who can help me? It's just ridiculous to be stuck like this.
I ordered a laptop and it arrived with a cracked screen. This is not what I expected, and I need this fixed quickly. I’ve attached the images showing the damage.
The blender I ordered arrived with a broken part. Can I get a refund for it?

Could you please clarify if the pro plan is billed on a monthly basis or if it is an annual subscription? I am trying to understand the payment structure better, as I need to plan my expenses accordingly.
I recently purchased a subscription and was charged, but I did not receive any confirmation email. I would like to request a refund for this transaction as I haven't been able to access the service.

I have reached out multiple times regarding my order issue, yet I receive no response. This is incredibly frustrating, as I was promised assistance within 24 hours. It feels as though my concerns are being ignored, and I demand an explanation for this lack of communication.
Are there any specific requirements to qualify for the pro plan, like a minimum number of users?

I've been trying to connect my device to the app for days now, and it keeps saying it's offline, but I know it's not. Sometimes it even shows the wrong status, like it's connected when it isn't. Can you help?
I updated my account info but I still can’t log in. Please help.
I received my order today, but the laptop screen is cracked. This is very disappointing and I expect a full refund as soon as possible.
I heard there's a release this weekend, but I can't find any details. Can you confirm if the service will be down during that time or not?
